title: Man United reveal location of new stadium
summary: Manchester United have confirmed the location for their proposed 100,000-seater stadium, marking a significant milestone in the club's stadium redevelopment plans.
content: Manchester United have confirmed the location for their proposed 100,000-seater stadium.

zh.title: 曼联公布新球场地点
zh.summary: 曼联确认了他们拟建的10万座球场的地点，这是该俱乐部体育场改造计划中的重要里程碑。

title: Source: Barça bid for Dortmund's Karim Adeyemi
summary: Barcelona have made an offer for Borussia Dortmund's Karim Adeyemi as they strengthen their attacking options for the upcoming season, according to sources.
content: Barcelona have made an offer for Borussia Dortmund's Karim Adeyemi as they continue to build their attack for next season, a source told ESPN.

zh.title: 消息人士：巴萨报价争夺多特蒙德的卡里姆·阿德耶米

title: Mbappé allays WC injury concern: 'I'm all good'
summary: Kylian Mbappé has downplayed injury concerns following France's 2-0 World Cup quarterfinal win over Morocco, describing the incident as a minor ankle knock.
content: Kylian Mbappé has downplayed concerns over what he described as a "knock on his ankle" during France's 2-0 World Cup quarterfinal win over Morocco.

zh.title: 姆巴佩消除世界杯伤势担忧："我没事"
zh.summary: 基利安·姆巴佩在法国以2:0战胜摩洛哥的世界杯四分之一决赛后，淡化了伤势担忧，表示这只是一个轻微的脚踝碰撞。

title: Sources: Pulisic has microfracture, bone bruise
summary: Christian Pulisic has sustained a bone bruise and microfracture in his lower leg and will be sidelined for several weeks, a significant blow to USMNT and AC Milan's ambitions.
content: USMNT and AC Milan attacker Christian Pulisic sustained a bone bruise and microfracture in his lower leg and will be sidelined for several weeks, U.S. Soccer confirmed on Thursday.

zh.title: 消息人士：普利西克患微骨折和骨挫伤
zh.summary: 克里斯蒂亚诺·普利西克的小腿遭受骨挫伤和微骨折，将被迫休赛数周，这对美国国家足球队和AC米兰的雄心壮志是一个重大打击。

title: Klopp: Mbappé, Liverpool had talks on private jet
summary: Jürgen Klopp revealed Liverpool's extensive 2017 efforts to sign Kylian Mbappé, including private jet negotiations that he characterized as the club's "most expensive non-transfer."
content: Jürgen Klopp has revealed the lengths Liverpool went to in an attempt to sign Kylian Mbappé in 2017, citing talks on a private jet in the "most expensive non-transfer" the club were involved in.

zh.title: 克洛普：姆巴佩与利物浦曾在私人飞机上进行过谈判

title: England's Quansah gets 2-game ban for Ro16 red
summary: England fullback Jarell Quansah has been suspended for two matches following his red card in England's World Cup round-of-16 victory over Mexico.
content: England fullback Jarell Quansah has been suspended for two matches after receiving a red card in his side's World Cup round-of-16 win over Mexico.

title: Haaland says Norway's WC chances 'still really low...
summary: Norway striker Erling Haaland has acknowledged his team's slim World Cup winning chances while noting that England faces increased pressure ahead of their quarterfinal matchup.
content: Norway striker Erling Haaland has said that his side's chances of winning the World Cup are "really low" -- and that all the pressure is on England ahead of their World Cup quarterfinal in Miami.

summary: American forward Cole Campbell has completed a move from Borussia Dortmund to Bundesliga newcomer Elversberg.

content: At this summer's World Cup, the U.S. did its homework, aced the quizzes, and then failed the final exam. How should we grade its World Cup?

summary: Celtic have completed the signing of Colombian forward Camilo Duran from Qarabag on a five-year deal, strengthening their attacking depth.

title: Haaland is not just Norway's talisman, but also th...
summary: Erling Haaland has transcended being Norway's star player to become the avatar of the World Cup itself, with a chance to lead his nation past England in the quarterfinals.
content: In a different timeline, Haaland could have played for England, but the man has become the avatar for Norway and, in many ways, the World Cup as a whole. Can he launch them past England in the quarterfinals?

title: France cruise into semi-finals - could this be the best Les Bleus ever?
summary: France advances to the semi-finals after defeating Morocco, showcasing the squad that could be one of their strongest ever. As two-time World Cup winners (1998, 2018), Les Bleus are positioned as favorites for the 2026 competition.
content: World Cup winners in 1998 and 2018, France have created another special team and in beating Morocco showed why they are favourites to win the 2026 competition.

zh.title: 法国顺利晋级半决赛——这会是历史最强的法国队吗？
zh.summary: 法国在击败摩洛哥后成功晋级半决赛，展现出可能是历史上最强的阵容。作为两次世界杯冠军（1998年、2018年），法国队被定位为2026年竞赛的热门球队。

title: What's going on with penalties - is it time to end the 'stutter'?
summary: Kylian Mbappe's penalty miss in France's victory over Morocco exemplifies an emerging issue in modern football: players failing after using stutter steps in their approach. The trend raises questions about whether rule changes should address this coaching tactic.
content: Kylian Mbappe's penalty miss in France's win against Morocco is the latest example of a player missing a penalty after stuttering in the run-up.

zh.title: 点球怎么了——是时候结束"停顿"了吗？
zh.summary: 基利安·姆巴佩在法国战胜摩洛哥的比赛中的点球失手，体现了现代足球中出现的一个问题：球员在助跑中使用停顿步伐后失手。这一趋势引发了一个问题，即规则改变是否应该应对这种教练战术。
